name: ddl-generator
intent: Implement a native DDL generator that transforms Enhanced JSON Schema into CREATE TABLE statements for PostgreSQL and SQLite, completing the 'persistence as projection' vision where database structure is derived from the same schema that drives MST models.

indicators: Cross-cutting transformation utility used by persistence layer
No external API calls - purely internal schema transformation
Transforms Enhanced JSON Schema (internal format) to SQL DDL
Will be integrated with existing SqlBackend and query infrastructure
Creates foundational tooling other features depend on
uncertainties: How tightly coupled to meta-store vs standalone utility
